description_long: This is a stylized adult male figure with a muscular build, standing upright with arms slightly outstretched. He is shirtless, revealing a necklace and a tattoo on his left arm, and wears knee-length shorts with a subtle pattern. His feet are bare, and his skin tone is light. The figure has a distinctive, voluminous hairstyle that is swept upward and back. The overall appearance suggests a casual, beach or summer setting, with accessories and body art adding character. The model is detailed enough to show anatomical features, jewelry, and clothing folds.
description: A shirtless adult male with a muscular build, wearing knee-length shorts, a necklace, and sporting a voluminous swept-back hairstyle. He has a tattoo on his left arm and stands barefoot.
description_view_0: Front view shows the shirtless torso, necklace, tattoo on the left arm, and patterned shorts.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the arm tattoo, profile of the face, and the volume of the hairstyle.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back muscles, necklace, and the back of the shorts and hairstyle.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the clean arm, side profile, and the shorts' side pattern.
attribute_clothing_type: casual knee-length shorts with a necklace accessory
